case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. SEAVIEW INSURANCE CO.

SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEAVIEW INSURANCE CO. $100,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $100,450.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REPLY TO PLTFF'S OPPOS TO MTN BY REAL PARTIES IN INTEREST FOR RELIEF FROM SUMMARY JUDGMNET PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SEC 473(B) FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY

SURETY'S NTC OF MTN AND MTN FOR RELIEF FROM SUMM JUDGMENT, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY HEARING SET FOR NOV-22-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
REPLY TO PLTFF'S OPPOS TO MTN FOR RELIEF FROM SUMMARY JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SEC 473(B) FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY
MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-18-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS DENIED. SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY DID NOT FILE A TIMELY MOTION WITHIN THE APPEARANCE PERIOD UNDER PENAL CODE 1305, AND THE COURT ENTERED SUMMARY JUDGMENT IN ACCORDANCE WITH PENAL CODE 1306. CONSEQUENTLY, THE COURT LACKS JURISDICTION TO SET ASIDE THE SUMMARY JUDGMENT BASED ON SEAVIEW'S MISTAKE, INADVERTENCE, OR EXCUSABLE NEGLECT PURSUANT TO CCP 473. (COMPARE PEOPLE V. NORTH RIVER INSURANCE COMPANY (2011) 200 CAL.APP.4TH 712 WITH PEOPLE V. STUYVESANT INS. CO. (1963) 216 CAL.APP.2D 380.) ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, COURT REPORTER: TONY VAUGHN, CSR #6185
COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY
MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-22-2013 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. RULING: THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. REAL PARTY IN INTEREST SEAVIEW INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR RELIEF FROM SUMMARY JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE A PROOF OF SERVICE OR COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.
